name: token_boundary_subrule_no_skip
description: Subrules inside < ... > don't get whitespace skipping

name: token_boundary_partial
description: Only part of rule in < ... >; rest gets whitespace skip
grammar:
ROOT <- TOP
TOP <- < A > B C
A <- 'a'
B <- 'b'
C <- 'c'
%whitespace <- [ \t\r\n]*

name: token_boundary_all_subrules
description: All subrules inside < ... > form one token
grammar:
ROOT <- TOP
TOP <- < A B C >
A <- 'a'
B <- 'b'
C <- 'c'
%whitespace <- [ \t\r\n]*

name: token_boundary_with_backtracking
description: Token boundary works correctly with backtracking
grammar:
S <- A / B
A <- < 'hello' > ' world'
B <- < 'hello' > ' there'
%whitespace <- ''
